name: Korolova
description:
'''Olga Korolova''' (born 17 March 1988), also known as '''Korolova''', is a Ukrainian DJ and music producer. She primarily produces [[melodic techno]] and [[progressive house]] music.

Korolova has played the main stage at the music festival [[Tomorrowland (festival)|Tomorrowland]], performed at [[Electric Daisy Carnival|EDC]] Las Vegas, [[Untold Festival|Untold]], NEON Countdown, So Track Boa, [[Parookaville]], and collaborated with record labels Tomorrowland Music, [[Insomniac (promoter)#Insomniac Music Group|Insomniac]], and [[Anjunabeats]]. In parallel to concerts, she also maintains a strong presence on social media, especially [[YouTube]] where she publishes videos of concerts, entire DJ sets, and singles.

Korolova released tracks under well-known labels such as [[Ultra Records]], [[Armada Music|Armada]], [[AFTR:HRS]], and [[Get Physical Music]], before starting her own label, Captive Soul, in 2023. She has performed at iconic venues such as Space Miami, [[Green Valley (club)|Green Valley Brazil]], and [[Space (Ibiza nightclub)|Hi Ibiza]], and played live streamed sets from many locations on several continents, including [[Miami]], [[Israel]], [[New York City|New York]], and [[Kyiv]].

In 2023, Korolova delivered over 100 performances across 50 countries.

In 2024, Korolova attended her first fashion week in [[Paris]] as a first step of entering the [[fashion]] world.
